comment: Link-check config for docs/*.md + README.md, reused by CI.
- localhost / 127.0.0.1: runtime URLs printed by the demo (api 3001, worker 3002, web 3003, Grafana 3000, Loki 3100, Tempo 3200, OTLP 4317/4318) — not navigable pages.
- github.com/bymaxone/*: the org repos are private/pre-publish, so anonymous link checks 404 even though the links are correct for an authenticated reader.
- img.shields.io: dynamically generated badge images, not navigable HTML pages; rate-limited under CI.
- npmjs.com / coralogix.com: return 403 to automated link checkers (bot protection); the pages are reachable in a browser and verified manually.
